caption: A woman with dark hair wears a striped purple and white button-down shirt and black over-ear headphones while sitting in an indoor setting. She is positioned in front of a plain wall and a light-colored curtain. In the bottom left corner of each scene, the on-screen text "Nancy Ramya" is visible. Throughout the sequence, she is speaking, her mouth opening and closing as she articulates words. Her facial expression remains focused, and she looks slightly off-camera. Her head shifts slightly as she speaks, and her expression transitions from a more closed mouth to a wider opening during her speech. The background remains static, consisting of the neutral wall, the curtain, and a ledge or piece of furniture behind her.
